Books
  • A Feast for Crows (mentioned)
  • A Dance with Dragons (appendix)

Boremund Harlaw, known as Boremund the Blue, is a member of House Harlaw. He is the master of the castle Harridan Hill. His personal sigil is the Harlaw scythe on a pale blue field. He has three sons.[1]

Contents

  • 1 Recent Events
    • 1.1 A Feast for Crows
  • 2 Family
  • 3 References

Recent Events[ ]

A Feast for Crows[ ]

Although Boremund has his own castle, he remains a subject to his cousin Rodrik Harlaw, the head of his house. Boremund comes to the Ten Towers to support Asha Greyjoy in the kingsmoot.[1]
